text: Hey sweetheart just checking in, haven't heard from you in a few days 🙂 everything ok?
Yeah all good mum sorry been flat out with work!! How are you feeling?
Oh don't worry about me I'm fine! Just missed you. Call me when you get a chance xx
Hey sweetheart, just checking in. Haven't heard from you in a few days, everything okay?
Hi Dad! Yeah all good, just been slammed with work. Sorry for going quiet 😅
No worries, just wanted to make sure. Call me when you get a chance, love you
hey you still good for our call sunday? was thinking like 3ish your time
yes!! 3 is perfect, been looking forward to it all week honestly 🥰
same, ok locking it in!! speak then xx
omg did you see the photos mum posted from sunday 😭 why do i look like that in every single one
HAHA i was waiting for you to say something lol you look fine!! tbh i'm more upset she chose the one where i'm mid-chew
💀💀 ok yes that one needs to be deleted immediately can you ask her or will she get offended again
hey did you get the photos from the reunion last weekend? mum finally sent the group ones lol
omg yes!! the one by the lake is SO good, we need to print that one. can you send me the original? mine got compressed 😭
haha already on it, sending now. also ur laugh in the last photo is iconic btw 😂
hey you good? haven't heard from you all day
yeah sorry just been swamped at work lol, home soon tho 🙏
ok good, I was starting to worry. want me to order something for dinner?
Hey sweetheart just checking in, haven't heard from you in a few days 🙂 everything ok?
Yeah all good mum sorry been flat out with work!! How are you feeling?
Recipe photo — pierogi filling ready for Sunday
Bringing the good roaster to dinner?
Door County in spring, mark it
How was the flare, better today?
Might need to cancel, pain is building — rain check?
Thank you for being easy about it
